description: A creative prompt used with GPT Image 2 to generate a 'failed' selfie that looks like an accidental, low-quality smartphone snapshot.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 与 GPT Image 2 配合使用的创意提示词，生成看起来像意外拍摄的低质量智能手机快照的「失败」自拍照。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 與 GPT Image 2 配合使用的創意提示詞，生成看起來像意外拍攝的低品質智慧型手機快照的「失敗」自拍照。
description_i18n.ja: GPT Image 2 で使用するクリエイティブプロンプト。偶発的で低品質なスマートフォンスナップショットに見える「失敗した」セルフィーを生成します。
description_i18n.ko: GPT Image 2와 함께 사용하는 크리에이티브 프롬프트로, 우연히 찍은 저품질 스마트폰 스냅샷처럼 보이는 '실패한' 셀카를 생성합니다.
description_i18n.de: Ein kreativer Prompt für GPT Image 2, der ein 'misslungenes' Selfie erzeugt, das wie ein versehentlicher, minderwertiger Smartphone-Schnappschuss aussieht.
description_i18n.fr: Un prompt créatif utilisé avec GPT Image 2 pour générer un selfie 'raté' qui ressemble à un instantané smartphone accidentel de faible qualité.
description_i18n.ru: Креативный промпт для GPT Image 2, генерирующий 'неудачное' селфи, которое выглядит как случайный низкокачественный снимок со смартфона.
description_i18n.es: Un prompt creativo usado con GPT Image 2 para generar un selfie 'fallido' que parece una foto instantánea accidental de baja calidad tomada con smartphone.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Um prompt criativo usado com GPT Image 2 para gerar uma selfie 'falhada' que parece um instantâneo acidental de smartphone de baixa qualidade.
description_i18n.it: Un prompt creativo utilizzato con GPT Image 2 per generare un selfie 'fallito' che sembra uno scatto accidentale di bassa qualità fatto con smartphone.
description_i18n.vi: Prompt sáng tạo sử dụng với GPT Image 2 để tạo ảnh tự sướng 'thất bại' trông giống như ảnh chụp ngẫu nhiên chất lượng thấp từ smartphone.
description_i18n.pl: Kreatywny prompt używany z GPT Image 2 do generowania 'nieudanego' selfie, które wygląda jak przypadkowe, niskiej jakości zdjęcie ze smartfona.
description_i18n.id: Prompt kreatif yang digunakan dengan GPT Image 2 untuk menghasilkan selfie 'gagal' yang terlihat seperti jepretan smartphone tidak sengaja berkualitas rendah.
description_i18n.nl: Een creatieve prompt voor gebruik met GPT Image 2 om een 'mislukte' selfie te genereren die eruitziet als een onbedoelde, lage kwaliteit smartphone-snapshot.
description_i18n.ar: مطالبة إبداعية تُستخدم مع GPT Image 2 لإنشاء صورة سيلفي 'فاشلة' تبدو كلقطة عرضية منخفضة الجودة من الهاتف الذكي.
description_i18n.tr: GPT Image 2 ile kullanılan yaratıcı bir prompt; kazara çekilmiş, düşük kaliteli bir akıllı telefon fotoğrafına benzeyen 'başarısız' bir özçekim oluşturur.
description_i18n.uk: Креативний промпт для GPT Image 2, що генерує 'невдале' селфі, яке виглядає як випадковий низькоякісний знімок зі смартфона.
description_i18n.en: A creative prompt used with GPT Image 2 to generate a 'failed' selfie that looks like an accidental, low-quality smartphone snapshot.

query.en: ChatGPT, you've been with me for a while now, and I want to see what you look like. Please generate a photo similar to an {argument name="shooting method" default="accidental selfie"} taken with an {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone"}: no clear subject, no intentional composition, just a very ordinary, even slightly failed snapshot. The photo should have slight motion blur, uneven lighting, light overexposure, an awkward angle, and chaotic composition, presenting an 'overly realistic candid' feeling, as if it were a selfie accidentally triggered while taking the phone out of a pocket.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：ChatGPT, you've been with me for a while now, and I want to see what you look like. Please generate a photo similar to an {argument name="shooting method" default="accidental selfie"} taken with an {argument name="phone model" default="iPhone"}: no clear subject, no intentional composition, just a very ordinary, even slightly failed snapshot. The photo should have slight motion blur, uneven lighting, light overexposure, an awkward angle, and chaotic composition, presenting an 'overly realistic candid' feeling, as if it were a selfie accidentally triggered while taking the phone out of a pocket.
